title: General Franky Enters
description: On pages 1–5, this part focuses on Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is general franky enters.
scene: The scene follows general franky enters, keeping the focus on Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ughhh... the kraken that body had tamed to do his bidding...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...has thrown its lot in with the straw hats!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now listen, surume!! I want you to stay here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It is a pleasure to meet you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh? Running in object terror from our forces, are they?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then let's take this opportunity to take out the enemy big-shots!! Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Commander Chopper... is it just me, or is our vehicle shaking?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ahahah hahah!! They fell for it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look at you!! powerless in the face of my Daruma drop!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just opened a myriad of holes in the ground right beneath you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...with the power of my razor-sharp fangs!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, let's do the same to the bike- riding moron as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's going on, you guys?! USOP!! Chopper!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh, no... it's a pitfall trap!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ehhhhhh?!!! Is this guy a complete idiot?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why, you....!! I'm not going to take this lying down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What are you playing at, frankly ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the big idea, throwing out the Commander .....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No offense. It's just that this baby only seats a single driver!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's time to train- Storm!! hen... Tai!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We already know you're a pervert!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ohhh, Wooo Ooooo Ooooo Ooooo Ooooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo Oooo OOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dr. vegapunk, I hope you're watching!! The dream you once had is now a reality!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By incorporating the memory alloy "Wapometal" into the design, I've been able to complete your design!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's a real live combining robot!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A cheap move, but it's dangerous!!!

summary: General Franky Enters. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
